body.title: Build interactive HTML spec template with parameter editing and copy-as-prompt
body.result: interactive levers spec with toggle controls, 3 presets, copy-as-JSON + copy-as-prompt export (ADC 877ae87)
body.description:
Static HTML specs are better than Markdown but still one-directional. Full pattern from Anthropic blog (URL 20): sliders/toggles for adjusting design parameters, then 'copy as JSON' or 'copy as prompt' to reimport changes into Claude Code. Enables genuine two-way collaboration on specs rather than iterative prose conversations. Build a standard template; test with the levers document as proof of concept. Gated on T-html-planning-artifacts completing (basic HTML first, then interactive).

**Affected files:** lab/docs/html_spec_template.html (new), lab/docs/Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers_A_layer_on_top_of_skills.html (new interactive version)
**Design rules:** none — frontend artifact, no server-side dependencies
**Scope boundary:** In scope: tab navigation, parameter controls (checkboxes/toggles for lever activation), copy-as-JSON button, copy-as-prompt button. Out of scope: server-side rendering, build tooling, CI integration.
**Test plan:** Open in browser; toggle a lever; click copy-as-prompt; verify clipboard contains valid prompt with adjusted parameters. Verify mobile-responsive layout.
